channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Federal ban on second-generation rodenticides protects native Australian animals
item.description: Australian authorities have recently announced a significant ban on second-generation anticoagulant rodenticides (SGARs), a class of rat and mouse poisons that have been proven to pose serious threats...

item.title: US Military Assets to Remain in Philippine Bases Amid Middle East Conflicts
item.description: MANILA, Philippines – The United States has no plans to withdraw its military assets from the Philippines, according to Rear Admiral Roy Vincent Trinidad, Philippine Navy spokesperson for the West Phi...

item.title: Captain Sammir Reconciles with Wife Gilo, Affirms Their Marriage Is Still Strong
item.description: TikTok star Captain Sammir has publicly apologised to his wife, Gilo Ntinyari, after a heated exchange of personal allegations online. The drama began after Sammir expressed regret over how rushed the...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Introduces Salary Cuts and Government Spending Reductions Amid Fuel Crisis
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has announced a set of austerity measures to help Pakistan cope with the financial impact of the ongoing Middle East conflict. These measures include salary re...

item.title: Heavy rains cause flooding and disrupt life in Dar es Salaam
item.description: Dear nephew Milambo, greetings from Dar es Salaam. Life here is very different from our village Ukumbisiganga in Tabora. The city is noisy, busy and full of traffic jams, which makes moving around a b...

item.title: SADC Urged to Boost Industrial Growth Through Mineral Value Addition and Regional Integration
item.description: Elias Magosi, Executive Secretary of the Southern African Development Community (SADC), has called on the region to move beyond exporting raw minerals and accelerate value addition to drive industrial...

item.title: Escalation in Middle East: Iran attacks UAE port and threatens US military amid Kharg Island tensions
item.description: Iran has carried out a drone strike on the critical port of Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates, one of the region’s largest oil facilities, amid escalating tensions with the United States. Following...

item.title: Toronto Raptors defeat Phoenix Suns 122-115 with strong late-game performance
item.description: The Toronto Raptors secured a much-needed 122-115 victory over the Phoenix Suns on Friday night, snapping a long stretch of losses against teams with winning records. Brandon Ingram led the Raptors wi...

item.title: Understanding the Serious Messages Behind Operation Epic Fury for Children
item.description: The article discusses the cartoon series by Fiona Katauskas, focusing on 'Operation Epic Fury', a story that, while presented in a humorous style, deals with serious themes that can impact children. T...

item.title: PM Modi Inaugurates Multiple Connectivity and Infrastructure Projects in West Bengal
item.description: On 14th March 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi visited Kolkata to inaugurate several key infrastructure projects across West Bengal, with a total investment of ₹18,680 crore. The PM laid the foundat...

item.title: LEGO Launches Official Tintin Moon Rocket Set from LEGO Ideas
item.description: LEGO has officially released the Tintin Moon Rocket as part of its LEGO Ideas line, fulfilling a longtime dream for fans of Hergé’s classic comics. The set, numbered 21367, stands 49 centimeters tall ...

item.title: Researchers Identify Ancient Plant DNA Regulatory Sequences Preserved for 400 Million Years
item.description: A team of scientists from Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory and international collaborators has discovered a vast collection of plant DNA sequences that have remained conserved for over 400 million years....

item.title: Afghan Taliban Drone Attacks Injure Four Civilians in Pakistan, Intercepted Before Hitting Targets
item.description: On 13th March 2026, the Afghan Taliban launched rudimentary drones targeting areas near Rawalpindi, Kohat, and Quetta, injuring four people, including two children. Pakistan’s Inter-Services Public Re...

item.title: PM Shehbaz introduces austerity measures, including salary reductions and fuel cuts for government officials
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has approved a set of austerity measures targeting state-owned enterprises and government institutions to address financial challenges arising from the ongoing Middle Eas...

item.title: Former Defence Minister Mosiuoa Lekota Honoured at Bloemfontein Funeral
item.description: Mosiuoa 'Terror' Lekota, the founding leader of the Congress of the People (COPE) and former South African Defence Minister, was laid to rest on Saturday in Bloemfontein. Lekota, who earned the nickna...

item.title: Soludo Begins Second Term with Focus on Security, Economy, and Technology
item.description: Since Professor Charles Chukwuma Soludo took over as Governor of Anambra State in March 2022, the state don experience serious transformation. Three years down, as e dey ready for second term, the peo...

item.title: Married men’s experiences with bar waitresses compared to modern wives
item.description: In this article, Wa Muyanza explores why some married men, like Kitojo (Kito), enjoy spending time in bars rather than at home. According to Kito, bar waitresses, whom he affectionately calls 'wahudum...

item.title: Archbishop of Canterbury to undertake six-day pilgrimage before installation
item.description: Dame Sarah Mullally, the newly appointed Archbishop of Canterbury, will embark on a six-day pilgrimage from St Paul's Cathedral in London to Canterbury Cathedral ahead of her installation service on 2...

item.title: Namfrel Reports Low Voter Turnout in Remote Areas During Antipolo 2nd District Special Elections
item.description: On March 14, 2026, special elections were held in the 2nd legislative district of Antipolo City to fill the vacant congressional seat following the death of former Representative Romeo Acop late last ...

item.title: Trump Withholds Texas Senate Endorsement to Advance SAVE America Act in Senate
item.description: President Donald Trump is strategically delaying his endorsement in the Texas Republican Senate primary between Sen. John Cornyn and Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton to exert pressure on GOP senators...
